zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Touchet於1468年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley39歲，母親Elizabeth Courtenay36歲。她於1490年與Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年10月8日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Touchet于1468年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley39岁，母亲Elizabeth Courtenay36岁。她于1490年与Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年10月8日在英国英格兰薩默塞特布普頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Touchet was born in 1468, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Courtenay, was 36. She married Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton in 1490, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 October 1530, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Touchet est née en 1468, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Courtenay, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton en 1490, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 octobre 1530, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Touchet 1468 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Courtenay 36. Sie hat 1490 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Oktober 1530 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Touchet è nata il nel 1468 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Courtenay, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton nel 1490, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 ottobre 1530, nel Brympton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Touchetが1468年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audleyは39歳，母Elizabeth Courtenayは36歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスでSir John Sydenham Sr of Brymptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年10月8日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Touchet(이)가 1468년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Courtenay(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 10월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Touchet nasceu em 1468, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Courtenay, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton em 1490, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1530, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Touchet родилась в 1468 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Courtenay, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton в 1490 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 октября 1530 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Touchet nació en 1468, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Courtenay, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton en 1490, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1530, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
